surfaces.name: Synth API OpenAPI spec
surfaces.notes: Public Swagger 2.0 spec for the Synth API (48 unauthenticated GET endpoints — probabilistic price forecasts, market insights, leaderboards). The official synth-subnet README documents the API docs at api.synthdata.co/docs.

surfaces.name: Synth API
surfaces.notes: Public no-auth REST API at api.synthdata.co exposing Synth's probabilistic price forecasts, leaderboards, and market insights; the /v2/leaderboard/latest endpoint returns JSON with no authentication. Documented in the official synth-subnet README.

surfaces.name: Synth leaderboard history
surfaces.notes: Public no-auth GET returning historical per-miner reward records over a date range (query params start_time/end_time/prompt_name), distinct from the already-registered /v2/leaderboard/latest snapshot. Documented in the subnet's own OpenAPI spec (already the registered schema_url) as "Leaderboard - Leaderboard History V2".
